Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edmund Lucas defendant appearing in pro per.
No other appearances.

The court informs the defendant tentative ruling of the court as no appearances by opposing party or counsel for defendant. The court also informs defendant to contact his counsel for any information. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LUCAS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of Issues is DENIED.
Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. No issues to be adjudicated are stated in the Notice of Motion or Separate Statement. CRC 3.1350(b).
Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Plaintiff included in the separate statement as material facts, facts number 8, 9, and 10. These facts are disputed, and the dispute is supported by admissible evidence.
